'''Red 7''' was a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CCG-Red7" /> Flown by [[Elyhek Rue/Legends|Elyhek Rue]], the fighter was assigned to the [[Griffon Flight Wing]] where it participated<ref name="CCG-Rue" /> on a strike on the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Devastator/Legends|Devastator]]'' during the [[Subjugation of Ralltiir|subjugation]] of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]].<ref name="CCG-Red7" />

The ship was reassigned to [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]]<ref name="CCG-Red7" /> and stationed at the [[Great Temple/Legends|Rebel base]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="ANH" /> Rue flew the X-wing against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="CCG-Rue" />
